forzaHorizon6ReleaseDate.title: Forza Horizon 6 Release Date, Steam Unlock, and Early Access
forzaHorizon6ReleaseDate.intro: Track the key launch dates for Forza Horizon 6 across Xbox, PC, Steam, Game Pass, and PlayStation 5. This guide highlights when the game comes out, when Early Access starts, and which platform gets access first.

items.label: Official Launch Date
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 launches on Xbox Series X|S and PC through the Microsoft Store, Xbox app, and Steam. Standard and Deluxe Edition players enter during the full launch window.

items.label: Steam Store Date
items.description: The Steam storefront displays May 18, 2026 for the Steam release and provides the live store countdown, purchase buttons, and edition options.

items.label: Premium Early Access
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 Premium Edition players and Premium Upgrade owners can start up to four days before the full launch.

items.label: Game Pass Launch
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 Standard Edition is included with Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass on launch day.

items.label: PlayStation 5 Release
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 arrives on PlayStation 5 later in 2026, with wishlist access available through the PlayStation Store.

summary: Forza Horizon 6 launches first on Xbox Series X|S and PC.
Forza Horizon 6 Premium Early Access starts four days before the full launch.
Forza Horizon 6 Steam timing can display one day earlier because storefront timing is region-based.

forzaHorizon6SteamPreOrder.title: How to Pre-Order Forza Horizon 6 on Steam
forzaHorizon6SteamPreOrder.intro: Use this Forza Horizon 6 Steam guide to choose an edition, understand Advanced Access, collect the pre-order bonus, and review PC store requirements before launch.

steps.title: Forza Horizon 6 Steam Store Page
steps.description: Open the Forza Horizon 6 Steam app page and use the wishlist, follow, or pre-purchase options. Steam lists Xbox Game Studios as publisher and Playground Games as developer.

steps.title: Forza Horizon 6 Steam Edition Choice
steps.description: Choose Standard Edition at $69.99, Deluxe Edition at $99.99, or Premium Edition at $119.99 depending on launch access and included content.

steps.title: Forza Horizon 6 Advanced Access Check
steps.description: Steam labels Advanced Access for the Premium Edition, while the Forza launch guide describes Premium Early Access as up to four days before the May 19 launch.

steps.title: Forza Horizon 6 Pre-Order Bonus
steps.description: Players who purchase a full edition or the Premium Upgrade before launch receive the exclusive pre-tuned Ferrari J50, redeemable from the in-game Autoshow when Forza Horizon 6 releases.

steps.title: Forza Horizon 6 Steam Feature Review
steps.description: Review Steam features such as single-player, online PvP, online co-op, Family Sharing, Windows 10 22H2, DirectX 12, 16 GB RAM, broadband internet, and SSD storage.

forzaHorizon6EditionsAndPrice.title: Forza Horizon 6 Editions, Prices, and Included Content
forzaHorizon6EditionsAndPrice.intro: Compare Forza Horizon 6 Standard, Deluxe, Premium Edition, and Premium Upgrade before buying. The main decision is whether you want only the full game, extra cars, or the full Premium package with Early Access and expansions.

includes: Pre-order Ferrari J50 bonus when purchased before launch
items.bestFor: Forza Horizon 6 players who want the base game or plan to play through Game Pass.

includes: Car Pass with 30 cars delivered weekly
items.bestFor: Forza Horizon 6 players who want extra car content without Premium Early Access.

includes: Up to four days Premium Early Access
Italian Passion Car Pack after launch
items.bestFor: Forza Horizon 6 players who want the earliest access and the broadest content bundle.

includes: Up to four days Premium Early Access
Italian Passion Car Pack after launch
items.bestFor: Forza Horizon 6 Game Pass members or Standard and Deluxe owners who want Premium benefits without buying another full edition.

forzaHorizon6GamePass.title: Is Forza Horizon 6 on Game Pass?
forzaHorizon6GamePass.intro: Forza Horizon 6 Standard Edition is included with Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass on May 19, 2026. Game Pass players can also buy the Premium Upgrade for Early Access and Premium add-ons.

items.label: Game Pass Availability
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 Standard Edition joins Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass at launch on May 19, 2026.

items.label: Console Access
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 console access is listed for Xbox Series X|S through Game Pass Ultimate, with Xbox Cloud Gaming included as part of the membership path.

items.label: PC Access
items.value: PC Game Pass or Game Pass Ultimate
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 PC players can access the game through the Xbox app and Microsoft Store with an eligible subscription.

items.label: Premium Upgrade
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 Game Pass players can purchase the Premium Upgrade to play up to four days early and receive Premium Edition add-ons.

items.label: Xbox Play Anywhere
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 Microsoft Store and Xbox purchases support Xbox Play Anywhere across eligible Xbox console and PC devices.

items.label: Steam Version
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 on Steam is sold as a separate storefront purchase with Standard, Deluxe, and Premium pre-purchase options.

faq.title: Forza Horizon 6 FAQ
faq.subtitle: Quick Forza Horizon 6 answers for launch date, Steam, Game Pass, Premium Early Access, and platform availability.

questions.question: When is the Forza Horizon 6 release date?
questions.answer: Forza Horizon 6 launches on Xbox Series X|S and PC on May 19, 2026, with the Steam store displaying May 18, 2026 for its storefront timing.

questions.question: Does Forza Horizon 6 have Premium Early Access?
questions.answer: Yes. Forza Horizon 6 Premium Edition and Premium Upgrade owners can start up to four days early beginning May 15, 2026.

questions.question: Is Forza Horizon 6 on Steam?
questions.answer: Yes. Forza Horizon 6 is available for Steam pre-purchase with Standard, Deluxe, and Premium Edition options.

questions.question: Is Forza Horizon 6 on Game Pass?
questions.answer: Yes. Forza Horizon 6 Standard Edition is included with Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass on launch day.

questions.question: How much does Forza Horizon 6 cost on Steam?
questions.answer: Forza Horizon 6 Steam pricing lists Standard Edition at $69.99, Deluxe Edition at $99.99, and Premium Edition at $119.99.

questions.question: Is Forza Horizon 6 coming to PlayStation 5?
questions.answer: Yes. Forza Horizon 6 arrives on PlayStation 5 later in 2026 after the Xbox Series X|S and PC launch.
